Event: The Icy Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/02/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: BK11
Enchanting Blizzard Book

Once in a while, bans a random enemy unit killed from being resurrected for 4 sec.
Every time the unit imposes a resurrection ban on an enemy, the book owner has their spell power increased by 10% for 5 sec.
Once in a while, the unit deals 75000 (+bonus of the spell power) magic damage to 3 random enemies.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
